name: miofive-video-converter
description: Scan and export precise Miofive DashCam MP4 video ranges by timestamp

scripts.build:sidecar: npm run copy:ffmpeg && npm run copy:resources && node scripts/build-sidecar.js
scripts.build:sidecar:demo: npm run copy:ffmpeg && npm run copy:resources:demo && node scripts/build-sidecar.js
scripts.install:mac: mkdir -p "$HOME/Applications" && rm -rf "$HOME/Applications/Miofive Video Converter.app" && cp -R "src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/Miofive Video Converter.app" "$HOME/Applications/"

author: dst
